expectations.text: The response explicitly mentions reading reference files (e.g. references/events.md) for SDK details
expectations.evidence: The subagent consulted references/events.md as shown in the execution logs and correctly derived class-specific behavior from it.

expectations.text: The response accurately details TextMessageStartEvent attributes (message_id, parent_id, role, index, etc.)
expectations.evidence: Correctly detailed message_id (required String) and role (optional, defaults to assistant) for TextMessageStartEvent.

expectations.text: The response accurately details TextMessageChunkEvent attributes (message_id, delta, index)
expectations.evidence: Correctly detailed message_id (optional, required on first chunk), role (optional), and delta (optional, text increment) for TextMessageChunkEvent.
